title: FOR THE LOVE OF PAWS - 211info
text: FOR THE LOVE OF PAWS FOR THE LOVE OF PAWS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides low cost veterinary services including checkups, emergency services, and spay/neuter services. Services includes digital x-rays (including dental), ultrasound, lab equipment (bloodwork/urinalysis), and laser therapy. 725 SE Mosher Avenue Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Low income families and families of veterans and service members Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm, Friday 9am-noon Email (541) 677-6070 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (541) 677-6070 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: -General Exam: $65 -Urgent Exam: $95 -Emergency Care: $125 -Offers sliding scale fees DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of income AREA SERVED: City of Roseburg Services: Emergency Veterinary Services Neuter/Spay Services Sick Animal Care Veterinary Care Expense Assistance Well Animal Checkups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FOR THE LOVE OF PAWS
